display.purpose: Page hero titles only. 30px ceiling — never larger.

title.purpose: Card titles, patch names, primary row labels.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, nav, button text, chips — small tracked uppercase.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards on hover, paired with -2px translate — the card rises.

shadows.name: header-seat
shadows.purpose: Sticky header seam against scrolling content.

shadows.name: floating-bar
shadows.purpose: Selection bar and popover menus — detached, hovering above the field.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per context — Signal Orange fill, near-black text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #160a04; background: #FF4800; border: 1px solid #FF4800; border-radius: 4px; padding: 9px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter .15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF4800; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Secondary action — graphite fill, hairline border that lights up on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #E7E5E0; background: #1F2127; border: 1px solid #31343C; border-radius: 4px; padding: 9px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .15s; } .ds-btn:hover { border-color: #E7E5E0; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF4800; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Patch Card
components.description: Flat at rest, lifts on hover. Eyebrow + title + description.
components.html:
COMMUNITY
Brass Stab
Cluster engine, derived tags: brass, stab, bright.
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; text-decoration: none; background: #1F2127; border: 1px solid #31343C; border-radius: 6px; padding: 18px 20px 16px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; transition: box-shadow .18s, transform .18s, border-color .18s; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.5); transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #474b54; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .2em; color: #8C8A86; margin-bottom: 8px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #E7E5E0; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 300; color: #8C8A86; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Graphite field with Signal Orange focus outline.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #E7E5E0; background: #1F2127; border: 1px solid #31343C; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 10px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8C8A86; letter-spacing: .06em; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF4800; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Action Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .1em; padding: 2px 6px 1px; border-radius: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; background: rgba(255,72,0,.18); color: #FF4800; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.css: .ds-chip-tag { display: inline-block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .1em; padding: 2px 6px 1px; border-radius: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; background: rgba(91,141,239,.18); color: #3B9EEA; }

components.name: Nav Tabs
components.description: Flat tab row; active tab is full white with Signal Orange underline.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 2px; background: #0D0E11; padding: 0 8px; } .ds-nav-btn { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .14em; color: rgba(255,255,255,.32); background: none; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; padding: 8px 12px 7px; text-decoration: none; transition: color .15s, border-color .15s; } .ds-nav-btn:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,.72); } .ds-nav-btn.active { color: #fff; border-bottom-color: #FF4800; }

narrative.overview: This is an instrument readout, not a website. A near-black field holds a single hot signal color — Signal Orange — while small, precise, monospace labels glow against the dark. Everything reads like the panel of a measurement device: the data is the figure, the surface is ground, and the one accent is the live trace. Density is deliberate; variety comes from the scale-type color system, not from new shapes or decoration. Color here is data, not mood. The system rejects the generic SaaS dashboard, the cutesy toy aesthetic, and any impersonation of teenage.engineering's first-party site.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black surface with one hot accent (Signal Orange, ≤10% of any screen)
Monospace everywhere — JetBrains Mono is the entire type voice
Small, tracked, uppercase labels as the dominant UI text
Color is classification (the scale-type system), not decoration
Flat surfaces; depth appears only on interaction
Tactile, mechanical controls — hairline borders, tight radii

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Orange appears on ≤10% of any screen. It marks exactly one thing per context — the primary action, the active tab, the focus ring. If two oranges compete on a screen, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Color-Is-Data Rule
rules.body: The eight scale-type colors are forbidden as UI chrome. They classify value mappings and nothing else. A scale-type color on a button or a nav item is a bug.

rules.name: The Orange-Is-Not-Error Rule
rules.body: Signal Orange is the brand color — primary, active, focus, selection. It is never an error color. Errors and failures use Danger Red (--danger). Orange-tinted info notices are allowed (brand emphasis, not failure) and use Orange Ink for text; an error in orange is a bug.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is the entire type system. Adding a second family — a serif for elegance, a humanist sans for warmth — breaks the instrument metaphor. Forbidden.

rules.name: The Tracked-Label Rule
rules.body: Small UI text (≤11px) is always uppercase with ≥0.14em tracking. At this size the tracking is what makes mono legible; never ship tight small-caps.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat until touched. Any element with a resting drop shadow is wrong unless it is a transient floating control. Depth at rest comes from the tonal ramp, not from shadow.

dos: Do keep Signal Orange (#FF4800) to ≤10% of any screen — one live signal per context.
Do use Danger Red (--danger, #F87171) for every error/failure state; keep Signal Orange for brand/primary/active/focus only.
Do use JetBrains Mono for everything; express hierarchy through weight, size, tracking, and case.
Do uppercase and track (≥0.14em) any UI text ≤11px.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; let depth come from the tonal ramp and reserve shadow for hover and floating bars.
Do reserve the eight scale-type colors strictly for value-mapping data.
Do keep prose columns ≤~620px (≈65-75ch) against the dark field.
donts: Don't build the generic SaaS dashboard — no gradient hero metrics, no rounded-purple startup chrome, no card-grid-as-homepage as the default answer.
Don't drift into a cutesy/toy aesthetic — no emoji-as-UI, no over-rounded gamified flourishes.
Don't imitate teenage.engineering's first-party site; this is a distinct, fan-made tool.
Don't introduce a second font family for elegance or warmth.
Don't use a scale-type classification color as UI chrome (button, nav, border).
Don't put a resting drop shadow on a static surface — flat at rest, lift on interaction.
Don't use pure #FFFFFF on the body field; Readout White (#E7E5E0) is the text white.
Don't signal an error with orange — orange is the brand. Errors are Danger Red (--danger).
